title: WashU student reported missing
summary_en: Antonio Arellano-Banda was reported missing on May 8, according to the St. Louis Metropolitan Police Department’s Missing Persons Unit. According to the post, the last known contact between Arellano-Banda and his friends was on May 7.
author: Lewis Rand
title_cn: 美国华盛顿大学一名学生被报失踪
